CREATE TABLE default.ck (id Int32, name String);
SELECT id, groupArray(name) FROM default.ck GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, groupArray(name)(10) FROM default.ck GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, groupArray(name)(1) FROM default.ck GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, groupArray(name) FROM (SELECT id, name FROM default.ck WHERE id < 3) AS subquery GROUP BY id;
CREATE TABLE default.ck2 (id Int32, value Int32);
SELECT ck.id, groupArray(ck.name)(2), groupArray(ck2.value)(2) FROM default.ck AS ck JOIN default.ck2 AS ck2 ON ck.id = ck2.id GROUP BY ck.id;
SELECT id, groupArray(name) FROM (SELECT name FROM default.ck ORDER BY id DESC) AS ordered_names GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, groupArray(name)(5) FROM default.ck WHERE id = 1 GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, groupArray(name)(3) FROM (SELECT id, name FROM default.ck ORDER BY name ASC) WHERE id != 2 GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, groupArray(name) FROM default.ck GROUP BY id HAVING count(name) > 1;
SELECT groupArray(value) FROM default.ck2 WHERE value > 100 GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, groupArray(name)(10) FROM (SELECT name, id FROM default.ck ORDER BY name LIMIT 4) AS limited_names GROUP BY id;
